临床表现(病症表现).cypher: MATCH (d:疾病 {name: $entity_name}) RETURN d.name AS 疾病名称, d.symptom AS 症状

预防.cypher: MATCH (d:疾病 {name: $entity_name}) RETURN d.name AS 疾病名称, d.prevent AS 预防措施

治疗方法.cypher: MATCH (d:疾病 {name: $entity_name}) RETURN d.name AS 疾病名称, d.cure_way AS 治疗方法

所属科室.cypher: MATCH (d:疾病 {name: $entity_name}) RETURN d.name AS 疾病名称, d.cure_department AS 治疗科室

化验/体检方案.description: 查询疾病需要做的检查
化验/体检方案.cypher: MATCH (d:疾病 {name: $entity_name})-[r:need_check]->(check:检查) RETURN d.name AS 疾病名称, collect(check.name) AS 相关检查

定义.cypher: MATCH (d:疾病 {name: $entity_name}) RETURN d.name AS 疾病名称, d.desc AS 疾病描述

传染性.cypher: MATCH (d:疾病 {name: $entity_name}) RETURN d.name AS 疾病名称, d.infectious AS 传染性

治愈率.cypher: MATCH (d:疾病 {name: $entity_name}) RETURN d.name AS 疾病名称, d.cured_prob AS 治愈率

禁忌.description: 查询疾病不能吃的食物
禁忌.cypher: MATCH (d:疾病 {name: $entity_name})-[r:not_eat]->(food:食物) RETURN d.name AS 疾病名称, collect(food.name) AS 忌食食物

治疗时间.cypher: MATCH (d:疾病 {name: $entity_name}) RETURN d.name AS 疾病名称, d.cure_lasttime AS 治疗周期

病因.cypher: MATCH (d:疾病 {name: $entity_name}) RETURN d.name AS 疾病名称, d.cause AS 病因

相关病症.cypher: MATCH (d:疾病 {name: $entity_name})-[r:acompany_with]->(comp:疾病) RETURN d.name AS 疾病名称, collect(comp.name) AS 并发症

建议食物.description: 查询疾病建议吃的食物
建议食物.cypher: MATCH (d:疾病 {name: $entity_name})-[r:do_eat]->(food:食物) RETURN d.name AS 疾病名称, collect(food.name) AS 宜食食物

疾病基本信息.cypher: MATCH (d:疾病 {name: $entity_name}) RETURN d.name AS 疾病名称, d.symptom AS 症状, d.cause AS 病因, d.cure_way AS 治疗方法, d.prevent AS 预防措施, d.cure_department AS 治疗科室, d.desc AS 疾病描述, d.cure_lasttime AS 治疗周期, d.cured_prob AS 治愈率, d.easy_get AS 易感人群, d.get_prob AS 发病率

症状列表.cypher: MATCH (d:疾病 {name: $entity_name}) RETURN d.name AS 疾病名称, d.symptom AS 症状列表

症状相关疾病.cypher: MATCH (d:疾病)-[:has_symptom]->(s:症状 {name: $entity_name}) RETURN s.name AS 症状名称, collect(d.name) AS 相关疾病

推荐药品.cypher: MATCH (d:疾病 {name: $entity_name})-[r:recommand_drug]->(drug:药品) RETURN d.name AS 疾病名称, collect(drug.name) AS 推荐药品

药品信息.cypher: MATCH (d:药品 {name: $entity_name}) RETURN d.name AS 药品名称

药品生产厂家.cypher: MATCH (d:药品 {name: $entity_name})-[r:production]->(company:药企) RETURN d.name AS 药品名称, company.name AS 生产厂家

食物信息.cypher: MATCH (f:食物 {name: $entity_name}) RETURN f.name AS 食物名称

菜谱信息.cypher: MATCH (r:菜谱 {name: $entity_name}) RETURN r.name AS 菜谱名称

检查信息.description: 查询检查项目基本信息
检查信息.cypher: MATCH (c:检查 {name: $entity_name}) RETURN c.name AS 检查项目

科室信息.cypher: MATCH (d:科室 {name: $entity_name}) RETURN d.name AS 科室名称

药企信息.cypher: MATCH (c:药企 {name: $entity_name}) RETURN c.name AS 药企名称

症状信息.cypher: MATCH (s:症状 {name: $entity_name}) RETURN s.name AS 症状名称

疾病模糊查询.cypher: MATCH (d:疾病) WHERE d.name CONTAINS $keyword RETURN d.name AS 疾病名称, d.symptom AS 症状 LIMIT 20

症状模糊查询.cypher: MATCH (s:症状) WHERE s.name CONTAINS $keyword RETURN s.name AS 症状名称 LIMIT 20

药品模糊查询.cypher: MATCH (d:药品) WHERE d.name CONTAINS $keyword RETURN d.name AS 药品名称 LIMIT 20

疾病统计.cypher: MATCH (d:疾病) RETURN count(d) AS 疾病总数

症状统计.cypher: MATCH (s:症状) RETURN count(s) AS 症状总数

药品统计.cypher: MATCH (d:药品) RETURN count(d) AS 药品总数

疾病列表.cypher: MATCH (d:疾病) RETURN d.name AS 疾病名称, d.symptom AS 症状 LIMIT 50

症状疾病关联.description: 通过症状查询相关疾病
症状疾病关联.cypher: MATCH (s:症状 {name: $symptom_name})<-[:has_symptom]-(d:疾病) RETURN s.name AS 症状, d.name AS 相关疾病

疾病症状关联.description: 通过疾病查询相关症状
疾病症状关联.cypher: MATCH (d:疾病 {name: $disease_name})-[:has_symptom]->(s:症状) RETURN d.name AS 疾病, s.name AS 症状

通用实体查询.description: 查询任意实体的基本信息
通用实体查询.cypher: MATCH (n {name: $entity_name}) RETURN labels(n)[0] AS 实体类型, n.name AS 名称, properties(n) AS 属性

多实体查询.description: 查询多个实体的基本信息
多实体查询.cypher: MATCH (n) WHERE n.name IN $entity_names RETURN labels(n)[0] AS 实体类型, n.name AS 名称, properties(n) AS 属性

关系查询.cypher: MATCH (start {name: $start_name})-[r]->(end {name: $end_name}) RETURN start.name AS 起始节点, type(r) AS 关系类型, end.name AS 结束节点

关系扩展查询.cypher: MATCH (n {name: $entity_name})-[r]->(related) RETURN type(r) AS 关系类型, labels(related)[0] AS 关联实体类型, related.name AS 关联实体, properties(r) AS 关系属性

路径查询.description: 查询实体间的最短路径

相似疾病查询.description: 查询有相似症状的疾病
相似疾病查询.cypher: MATCH (d1:疾病 {name: $disease_name})-[:has_symptom]->(s:症状)<-[:has_symptom]-(d2:疾病) WHERE d1 <> d2 RETURN d2.name AS 相似疾病, collect(s.name) AS 共同症状, count(s) AS 共同症状数量 ORDER BY count(s) DESC LIMIT 10

疾病网络.cypher: MATCH (d:疾病 {name: $entity_name}) OPTIONAL MATCH (d)-[:has_symptom]->(s:症状) OPTIONAL MATCH (d)-[:recommand_drug]->(drug:药品) OPTIONAL MATCH (d)-[:acompany_with]->(comp:疾病) OPTIONAL MATCH (d)-[:not_eat]->(avoid:食物) OPTIONAL MATCH (d)-[:do_eat]->(good:食物) RETURN d.name AS 疾病, collect(DISTINCT s.name) AS 症状, collect(DISTINCT drug.name) AS 推荐药品, collect(DISTINCT comp.name) AS 并发症, collect(DISTINCT avoid.name) AS 忌食, collect(DISTINCT good.name) AS 宜食

知识图谱概况.description: 查询知识图谱整体概况
知识图谱概况.cypher: CALL db.labels() YIELD label CALL { WITH label MATCH (n) WHERE label IN labels(n) RETURN count(n) AS count } RETURN label, count ORDER BY label
